title: hebe diosmifolia
intro: Hebe diosmifolia, also known as Mountain Hebe or Pōhutukawa, is a native New Zealand plant that belongs to the heath family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Hebe diosmifolia include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support immune function and alleviate various health conditions.
